review_text: Remote fieldwork tracking finally works. Battery life is excellent.
GPS accuracy drops in dense urban areas. Not usable on my last project.
Offline sync is solid. Would like better export options.
Good concept but the UI needs work. Too many taps to log an observation.
The highlight reel feature saved hours of analysis time.
Participant recruiting add-on is overpriced but the core product is strong.
Recording failed mid-session. Lost 40 minutes of an interview.
Works well but video quality degrades on slow connections.
Best research repository I have used. Tagging is fast and smart.
Import from Notion is seamless. Search could be faster on large projects.
The insight clustering feature changed how our team synthesizes.
Pricing jumped 60% at renewal. Looking for alternatives.
Unmoderated testing at scale is genuinely easy. Results come in fast.
Prototype fidelity matters a lot here. Low-fi tests produce noisy data.
Figma integration is seamless. Task completion metrics are clear.
Participant panel is limited outside the US. International studies are hard.
Infinite canvas with real-time collaboration. Works across every team I have.
Templates are excellent. Performance slows on very large boards.
Feature-heavy. New users need onboarding or they get lost.
Workshop facilitation with remote teams is now actually enjoyable.
